summary: Completed testing of Caisse Session System: PIN-based server login, admin password login, invoice filtering by role (servers see only their invoices, admins see all), and user management tab (admin-only visibility). All 8 features from the test request are working correctly.

console_warnings.details: Warning: Missing `Description` or `aria-describedby={undefined}` for {DialogContent} - appears when opening user modal
console_warnings.severity: Minor - accessibility warning, does not affect functionality

passed_tests: ✅ Backend: POST /api/caisse/login with 'Caisse2026' returns admin role
✅ Backend: POST /api/caisse/login with wrong password returns 401
✅ Backend: POST /api/caisse/login with PIN '1234' returns server role (Marie Dupont)
✅ Backend: POST /api/caisse/login with invalid PIN returns 401
✅ Backend: POST /api/caisse/users creates server user with unique PIN (4-6 digits)
✅ Backend: POST /api/caisse/users creates manager user with PIN
✅ Backend: POST /api/invoices stores created_by (server name) field
✅ Backend: GET /api/invoices returns all invoices for admin (no role filter)
✅ Backend: GET /api/invoices?role=server&created_by=X filters by server name
✅ Backend: GET /api/caisse/users returns users with PIN field visible
✅ Backend: End-to-end server workflow (create user -> login -> create invoice -> filter)
✅ Frontend: Login page displays 2 modes: 'Serveur (PIN)' and 'Admin' buttons
✅ Frontend: Admin login with 'Caisse2026' password successful
✅ Frontend: Server login with PIN '1234' successful as 'Marie Dupont'
✅ Frontend: Admin sees 'Administrateur' badge in header
✅ Frontend: Server sees 'Serveur' badge in header
✅ Frontend: 'Utilisateurs' tab IS visible for Admin users
✅ Frontend: 'Utilisateurs' tab is HIDDEN for Server users
✅ Frontend: Admin sees ALL invoices (19 invoices from all servers)
✅ Frontend: Server sees ONLY their own invoices (1 invoice for Marie Dupont)
✅ Frontend: Invoice cards show 'Serveur: [name]' for creator identification
✅ Frontend: User management shows all users with PIN codes (PIN: 1234, etc.)
✅ Frontend: User management shows role badges (Serveur, Manager)
✅ Frontend: Add user modal has correct fields (full name, username, PIN, role)
seed_data_creation: Test users and invoices created during pytest execution (prefixed with TEST_ or E2E_)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Session system fully functional: 1) Login page with PIN (server) and Admin password modes. 2) Admin password 'Caisse2026' gives full admin access. 3) Server PIN login (e.g., 1234 for Marie Dupont) gives restricted access. 4) Invoice filtering works correctly - servers see only their own invoices via role=server&created_by=X params. 5) Utilisateurs tab only visible for admin users. 6) User creation supports 4-6 digit PIN codes and role selection (server/manager/admin).

features_verified.login_page_2_modes: Page de login avec 2 modes: 'Serveur (PIN)' et 'Admin' - ✅ VERIFIED
features_verified.admin_login: Connexion admin avec mot de passe 'Caisse2026' - accès complet - ✅ VERIFIED
features_verified.server_login_pin: Connexion serveur avec PIN (ex: 1234) - accès restreint - ✅ VERIFIED
features_verified.user_creation_pin: Création d'utilisateur avec code PIN unique (4-6 chiffres) - ✅ VERIFIED
features_verified.server_sees_own_invoices: Serveur ne voit QUE ses propres factures dans l'onglet Factures - ✅ VERIFIED (Marie Dupont sees 1 invoice)
features_verified.admin_sees_all_invoices: Admin/Manager voit TOUTES les factures de tous les serveurs - ✅ VERIFIED (Admin sees 19 invoices)
features_verified.created_by_field: Le nom du serveur est enregistré sur chaque facture (created_by) - ✅ VERIFIED
features_verified.users_tab_admin_only: L'onglet 'Utilisateurs' n'est visible que pour les admins - ✅ VERIFIED
